license_note: Available for use without attribution by asylum medicine clinicians in forensic medical evaluations.
usage_guide: Art Director references these diagrams in art_briefs.json with reusable_from_library: true and library_path: 'body-diagrams/asylummedicine/<filename>'. The forensic_report.html template renders via the bodyDiagram var. Select based on victim sex and injury locations from case-plan.json.

diagrams.description: Female whole body front+back. Primary overview for female victims.
diagrams.use_when: Default for any female victim forensic report

diagrams.description: Male whole body front+back. Primary overview for male victims.
diagrams.use_when: Default for any male victim forensic report

diagrams.description: Female torso close-up front+back. Stab/gunshot/injection detail.
diagrams.use_when: Stab wounds, gunshot wounds, injection sites, chest trauma
Stab wounds, gunshot wounds, injection sites, chest trauma

diagrams.description: Head 4 views: front, back, left, right. Any head/neck trauma.
diagrams.use_when: Head trauma, blunt force, strangulation, facial injuries
Falls from height, skull base fractures, overhead strikes

diagrams.description: Both hands palmar+dorsal. Defensive wounds, ligature, needles.
diagrams.use_when: Defensive wounds, ligature marks, needle marks, struggle evidence
Burns on soles, ankle ligature, dragging evidence

diagrams.description: Dental chart with universal numbering for specific tooth references.
diagrams.use_when: Detailed dental evidence citing specific tooth numbers
Bone fractures, skeletal remains, decomposed bodies
